nodes.label: sanitize(operation, request) — per-op allowlist
nodes.rationale: Deny-by-default per-operation allowlist as a pure domain function (no I/O, trivially unit-testable), hooked at the CompletionService choke point so every op including streaming variants is covered uniformly. model.params (trusted admin config) applied after the sanitized client request so clients cannot override admin settings; cost drivers n/max_tokens are clamped.

nodes.label: Transport Override Blocking (extra_headers/base_url/api_key)
nodes.rationale: extra_headers, extra_query, extra_body, base_url, api_key, organization are always stripped because they are the vectors by which a caller could exfiltrate the credential or inject headers.
